descriptionHtml:
NEW Fountaine Pajot Elba 45 for sale 2025 | Tax Not Paid

NEW CATAMARAN - FULLY EQUIPPED

If you’re exploring the market for a spacious and versatile sailing catamaran in 2025, the NEW Fountaine Pajot Elba 45 for sale 2025 is a compelling option worth serious consideration. Offered in the sought-after Quatuor Oceanic version, this yacht is in good condition and presents a rare opportunity for buyers, with eligibility for a substantial discount.

Key Features of the Elba 45 Quatuor Oceanic Version

Basic Equipment

  • 220V electrical system with a powerful 2000W inverter/charger
  • Electric winch for mainsail operations
  • Fusion Bluetooth audio package with four speakers for interior and deck entertainment
  • Fresh and sea water pressurized system for convenience and efficiency
  • Lazy bag and lazy jack system with automatic mainsail hook
  • Electric windlass (1500W), plus comfortable bow seats
  • Deck shower with hot water
  • Set of mooring lines and six fenders for secure docking
  • Interior LED lighting throughout, with curtains in all cabins

Comfort Options

  • Salon table conversion offering an extra berth when needed
  • Full air conditioning system (52K BTU) designed for the Quatuor version, maintaining a comfortable climate regardless of location
  • Four electric toilets using fresh water, supporting each cabin for privacy and convenience
  • Additional refrigerator (12V, 90 litres) for extended provisioning
  • Equipped forepeaks (port and starboard) for additional storage or crew accommodation
  • Built-in safe with combination lock for valuables

Navigation and Technology

  • GARMIN 1 Smart Cruising Package: includes autopilot, VHF, AIS and GPS 8410 chartplotter
  • 9KW generator (220V/50HZ) for complete energy independence underway or at anchor
  • Twin YANMAR 4JH57-CE engines for reliable performance
  • Additional windlass control at helm, including chain counter for safe anchoring
  • Antifouling coating with primary epoxy protection for hull longevity

This NEW Fountaine Pajot Elba 45 for sale 2025 is fully equipped and ready for its new owner in the beautiful city of La Rochelle. She’s maintained in Excellent condition and stands as a turnkey solution for anyone looking to embark on memorable voyages, all with the added benefit of a significant discount.

For those considering the next step towards ownership, this well-prepared and modern catamaran is waiting to help you realise your sailing ambitions. Contact Us Now!!
